entry.title: F110 - To add fields in the AVL
entry.content:
Tcode : F110

To add the below fields in the ALV  for proposal run.

  1. With Holding tax 

      2. Net due date

entry.title: Interest calculation days differs in FINT transaction
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While doing interest calculation in FINT we are getting an issue with interest calculation days.

Example: Interest executed on 31.07.2026 where interest need to calculated from 01.07.2026 to 31.07.2026 where interest days are 31 days but in system it was calculating 32 days and we didn't do any enhancement for the interest calculation days. Could you please check and update

entry.title: Problem in closing projects in CJ20N
entry.content: Problem in closing projects in CJ20N

entry.title: Payment list layout vendor address block
entry.content: In ECC 6.0 EHP8 (SAP_APPL 618 SP22), RFZALI20 calls ADDRESS_INTO_PRINTFORM with the requested number of address lines, but the report output does not display the formatted address block. Instead, only individual address columns are shown. Is this the standard design of RFZALI20, or is there a correction (SAP Note) or configuration that enables the formatted multi-line address output (like in RFZALI00) ?

entry.title: Standard asset report- J1IDEPCALPOST and AR02
entry.content:
There are two transaction codes for asset display report J1IDISPBLK and Depreciation Posting J1IDEPCALPOST . In both these reports there is one column of Inv. Supt. under which there are 2 issues:-

1. Negative values are being reflecting in the inv. supt. column. These should be positive values under asset additions column.

2. Secondly same values against asset codes are reflecting in AR02 Report as asset acquisitions.  Sample screenshot of AR02 of sample asset codes enclosed along with asset display report with column inv. Supt. for your reference.

entry.title: Issue : Old Fiscal Year open for Asset master data change
entry.content:
Hi

In PRD server, we have created some assets and post accusation value. Our system Fiscal year 2025 - 2026 is closed. Our Asset depreciation start date is 01.06.2026. Now we want change scarp value in the asset. But system showing the error " Fiscal Year 2026 is already closed in Financial Accounting". Our query , the all assets are created, Depr. start date 1.06.2026 (FY 2027) values are posting in FY 2027. While we change the scarp value in Asset master then why system ask to open the old fiscal year.

entry.title: Clarification on deprecation of SAP GUI transactions KB21N and KB23N in SAP S/4HANA 2025
entry.content:
Hi

We're using SAP S/4HANA 2022 On Premise and planning to upgrade to 2025. An Early Watch Report indicates that the KB21N and KB23N Apps are 'Deprecated since SAP S/4HANA 2025'.

OSS Note 3266933 confirms deprecation of Related apps in SAP S/4HANA 2023.

The SAP S/4HANA 2025 'What's New' documentation states that these apps have been replaced by Manage Direct Activity Allocation (F3697).

I need clarification on whether the term 'Apps' refers only to the Fiori apps KB21N, KB23N, KB24N or if the SAP GUI transactions KB21N and KB23N are also deprecated.

Currently, I use SAP GUI transactions KB21N and KB23N, and these are being flagged in the Early Watch Report.  We don't actually use the Apps KB21N or KB23N.

Also, I want to know if the drilldown functionality in CJI3N of Labour bookings (via CATS) will still drilldown to KB23N in SAP S/4HANA 2025.

Thanks

S

entry.title: Asset Master Data Correction
entry.content: The asset has been posted with a value, but ANLA-ZUJHR (year of acquisition) is blank, and the AS02 field is grayed out and cannot be edited.

entry.title: T811s Table currency field (FACURR) deriving details.
entry.content:
1. How the currency field(FACURR) is deriving in T811S table.
2. In KSU3 or KSU2 or KSU1 we are able to see currency field only when the sender rule type is fixed amount and fixed rate, but for sender rule type posted amounts the currency field is not available. can you please explain the reason.
3. If the currency field for the sender rule type posted amounts changed in T811s to some object currency(company code) from Controlling area currency, will there by any impact during the allocation cycles run.
For ex: USD to GBP.

entry.title: T811s Table currency field (FACURR) not changing when segment sender rule changed
entry.content:
If the currency field for the sender rule type posted amounts changed in T811s to object currency(company code) from Controlling area currency, will there be any impact during the allocation cycles run.
For ex: USD to GBP.

entry.title: F110 Automatic Vendor Bank Selection for ACH/Wire Payments Across Multiple Company Codes
entry.content: Vendor has multiple bank accounts (ACH and Wire) maintained in vendor master data. The same vendor is used across multiple company codes. Invoice posting is being automated through OCR/AI, so manual selection of Partner Bank Type (BVTYP) is no longer reliable. We need SAP ECC F110 to automatically determine the correct vendor bank account based on company code and/or payment method. Is there a standard configuration available before considering a custom enhancement?

entry.title: Posting rules in area 25 are different from area 01 for the asset.
entry.content: While testing getting the error “Posting rules in area 25 are different from area 01” for the Asset class AC030100 under the company code SIN for the Asset 30000001102 Capitalized on 01.03.2026.

entry.title: The commitment values show negative figures in S_ALR_87013019.
entry.content: Commitment values should normally be positive, and zero if there is no consumption. Why do negative values occur?

entry.title: descriptions of internal orders are not displayed in KOH3
entry.content: When running KOH3 for example internal order group IO_HSE, not all desprcitions are displayed. In change modus (KOH2) all descriptions are displayed

entry.title: Inquiry on Creating or Renaming Bank Account Types in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I would like to seek your advice regarding the Account Type field in the Manage Bank Accounts app.

Currently, when creating or maintaining a bank account, we can only select from the predefined Account Types shown below, for example:

I would like to confirm the following:

  1. Is it possible to create a new custom Account Type?
  2. Is it possible to rename or modify the description of the standard Account Types (e.g., "Current Account")?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards, 

HY

entry.title: ERROR AU 133 ASSET
entry.content:
Standard Transaction F-43:
1. POSITION) MOVEMENT 100 ON ASSET 130
2. POSITION) SUPPLIER

RECORDING ATTACHED.
ERROR AU133 IS TRIGGERED ON AREA 50.
THE ASSET DOES NOT HAVE AREA 50.

AREA 50 IS DISABLED FOR THE ASSET CLASS.

WAITING AN URGENT RESOLUTION.
THANK YOU.

BR

entry.title: DMEEX- PL_ELIXIR-O Elixir format for split payment we need to implement in xml
entry.content:
Is there already some ready format  pain.001.001.09 for  PL_ELIXIR-O (split payment)?

We copied the format from CGI_CT_V9 but then we are missing node <RmtInf><Ustrd> where there should be information in below format:

 /VAT/10n,2n/IDC/14x/INV/35x/TXT/33x

 Event 5 FI_PAYMEDIUM_DMEE_PL_ELIXIR_05 is not working.

entry.title: S_ALR_87012936 - I want to fetch planned depreciation only month wise
entry.content: I am executing T-code S_ALR_87012936, however it is showing planned & posted values both month-wise, how i can extract only planned depreciation values or how can i filter out only planned values in the dump

entry.title: Asset Useful Life Extension – Depreciation Recalculation for Fully/Partially Depreciated Assets
entry.content:
Business Requirement

We require SAP guidance on changing the useful life of existing assets and ensuring depreciation is recalculated correctly.

Scenario

We have two assets:

Asset 1

  • Capitalization Year: 2011
  • Original Useful Life: 30 Years
  • Depreciation: Still ongoing
  • Business Requirement: Reset useful life to 60 years effective 30.09.2026

Asset 2

  • Capitalization Year: 1995
  • Original Useful Life: 5 Years
  • Current Status: Asset is fully depreciated except for the remaining residual/scrap value of 5%
  • Business Requirement: reset useful life to 60 years effective 30.09.2026

Queries

  1. What is the SAP-recommended approach to change the useful life of these assets effective 30.09.2026?
  2. For the asset where depreciation is still running (Asset 1), will changing the useful life from 30 years to 60 years automatically recalculate the remaining planned depreciation prospe

entry.title: Single Payment for APP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are testing APP for our client's organization and while APP has been configured and running without any significant errors, I am Unable to generate a single payment for any particular vendor.

The APP run is grouping the invoices with their relevant Credit notes and Down payments and generating multiple payments instead of clearing out all these payments in one go.

Kindly suggest where I am going wrong because out of the three company codes in 1 company code it is not grouping but for the other two the payments are getting grouped as per invoice
